---
toc: false
title-block-style: none
---

```{=html}
<div class="newsletter-archive">

  <div class="newsletter-hero">
    <span class="newsletter-kicker">PUBLICATIONS</span>
    <h1>RC42 Newsletter Archive</h1>
    <p class="newsletter-bajada">
      Past editions of the RC42 Social Psychology newsletter, distributed to ISA members and the broader academic community.
    </p>
  </div>

  <div class="newsletter-year-list">

    <div class="newsletter-year-row">
      <div class="newsletter-year-label">2025</div>
      <div class="newsletter-year-issues">
        <div class="newsletter-issue">
          <div class="newsletter-issue-meta">
            <span class="newsletter-issue-title">RC42 Newsletter — June 2025</span>
            <span class="newsletter-issue-date">June 2025</span>
          </div>
          <a href="https://www.isa-sociology.org/uploads/imgen/2238-rc42newsletter-june-2025.pdf"
             target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="newsletter-read-link">
            Read newsletter
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="newsletter-year-row">
      <div class="newsletter-year-label">2024</div>
      <div class="newsletter-year-issues">
        <div class="newsletter-issue">
          <div class="newsletter-issue-meta">
            <span class="newsletter-issue-title">RC42 Newsletter — November 2024</span>
            <span class="newsletter-issue-date">November 2024</span>
          </div>
          <a href="https://www.isa-sociology.org/uploads/imgen/2040-rc42newsletter-november-2024.pdf"
             target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="newsletter-read-link">
            Read newsletter
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="newsletter-year-row">
      <div class="newsletter-year-label">2023</div>
      <div class="newsletter-year-issues">
        <div class="newsletter-issue">
          <div class="newsletter-issue-meta">
            <span class="newsletter-issue-title">RC42 Newsletter — May 2023</span>
            <span class="newsletter-issue-date">May 2023</span>
          </div>
          <a href="https://www.isa-sociology.org/uploads/imgen/1519-rc42newsletter-may-2023.pdf"
             target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="newsletter-read-link">
            Read newsletter
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>

  <div class="newsletter-footer-note">
    RC42 newsletters are distributed to ISA RC42 members. To receive future editions,
    <a href="/membership/index.html">join RC42 through ISA</a>.
    To submit content for the next newsletter,
    <a href="#">use the contribution form</a>.
  </div>

</div>
```
